texto: As an actor, you just want to work, and then you just want to be on a show or have a job that you love, and you hope that job will last - those things have happened. To have that platform to then talk about something that is very personal to me like marriage equality, it feels like a gift. I try and really respect that voice and not abuse it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jesse Tyler Ferguson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “As an actor, you just want to work, and then you just want to be on a show or have a job that you…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, love, work pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e trabalho.

To have that platform to then talk about something that is very personal to me like marriage equality, it feels like a gift. I try and really respect that voice and not abuse it.

texto: Well, my personal mission statement is that we want marriage equality in all 50 states. We want it not to be a state-by-state issue. We don't want it to be something the majority is voting on. I don't think the civil rights of any minority should be in the hands of any majority.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jesse Tyler Ferguson sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Well, my personal mission statement is that we want marriage equality in all 50 states. We want i…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, marriage, voting, útil em momentos de casamento e voting.

texto: Something I didn't even know was on my bucket list has been achieved. I have cooked Thanksgiving dinner with Martha Stewart. I vow to follow the gospel of her teachings and do my very best in the remarkably less glamorous kitchen of my own home... without the luxury of magically appearing prep bowls filled by a staff of sous chefs.
